name: Corner Kitchen Fast Food Simulator
short_description: Buy cooking equipment, prepare delicious meals, and serve hungry customers. Upgrade your setup, read customer reviews, and expand your business to become the top fast-food joint in the city.
detailed_description:
What’s New?

  • New Worker Types:
    Runner – Carries food boxes, restocks supplies, and refills cooking stations.
    Chef Upgrade – Now refills stations when food boxes are available in his station.
    Cleaner – Keeps the restaurant spotless, no more garbage piles!
    Cashier – Takes orders, collects food, and serves customers.

  • Restaurant Expansion:
    Grow your restaurant, expand the cooking area, and even open a second floor for more customers! Add extra cash registers to handle the rush and keep customers happy.

  • Decorate & Personalize:
    Paint walls and floors to match your style. Add flowers, paintings, and custom signboards to make your restaurant stand out. Rename your restaurant and truly make it your own!

  • Take customer orders and serve their meals quickly to keep them happy and earn positive reviews.

  • Design and furnish your restaurant with tables, chairs, and decorations to attract more diners. Keep it spotless to ensure excellent reviews and customer satisfaction.

  • Hire skilled cooks and staff to improve efficiency and train them to run operations smoothly.

  • Upgrade your equipment, experiment with new recipes, and expand your restaurant’s size and reach to dominate the fast-food industry in the city.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian
*languages with full audio support
